slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '화상 깊이별 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard Semibold small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '데었을 때' white bold, '집 처치 vs 병원' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: '깊이별 판단 기준 · 질병관리청 권장'. LARGE prominent line illustration child hand with burn injury white outline on dark background, clean minimal medical style. Bottom-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 042. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: 화상 기본 ✓. Headline COMPACT: 깊이가 white, 치료를 결정합니다 mint #2EC4B6. Center: SMALL line illustration skin layers cross-section showing epidermis dermis subcutaneous white outline minimal. Below illustration: Three horizontal cards stacked GENEROUS spacing, dark card background #1A2B3C rounded corners comfortable padding. Card 1: 1도 mint bold + 표피만 손상 white small. Card 2: 2도 mint bold + 진피까지 손상 white small. Card 3: 3도 red bold + 전층 파괴 white small. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: 1도 화상 ✓. Headline COMPACT: 붉지만 white, 물집은 없어요 mint #2EC4B6. Center: SMALL line illustration sunburned child skin surface only red white outline minimal clean. Below: mint outlined box GENEROUS padding rounded corners. Inside box three rows stacked GENEROUS spacing: Row 1 SMALL sun icon left mint + 가벼운 일광화상 white COMPACT right. Row 2 SMALL droplet icon left mint + 붉고 통증 있음 white COMPACT right. Row 3 SMALL checkmark icon left mint + 물집 없음 white COMPACT right. Bottom area dark card #1A2B3C rounded: 집 처치 가능 mint bold + 찬물 냉각 20분 white small. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: 2도 화상 ⚠. Headline COMPACT: 물집이 생기고 white, 통증이 심해요 red #E63946. Center: SMALL line illustration blister on skin dermis layer affected white outline minimal medical. Below: Two cards stacked GENEROUS spacing. Card 1 mint border #1A2B3C rounded padding: 얕은 2도 mint bold + 집 치료 가능 white small + SMALL bandaid icon mint right. Card 2 red border #1A2B3C rounded padding: 깊은 2도 red bold + 병원 진료 필요 white small + 피부이식 가능성 white smaller + SMALL hospital icon red right. Bottom thin red divider. No pixel values as text on card. No quotes on card.

Top-left bright red rounded label: 3도 화상 ❌. Headline COMPACT: 하얗거나 검게 white, 반드시 병원으로 bright red #E63946. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. common_style:
# 경고·긴급 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 짙은 네이비 #0D1B2A
- 텍스트: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 긴급 강조: bright red #E63946
- 안전/긍정: mint #2EC4B6
- 카드 배경: #1A2B3C
- GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 25% 작게
- 슬라이드마다 아이콘/일러스트 필수
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 white (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '[토픽] 긴급 가이드'.
Top-right below stripe: '소아과언니' white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes.
Headline COMPACT (25% smaller): '[첫 줄]' white bold, '[핵심 긴급 표현]' bright red #E63946.
Small white subtitle: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE prominent line illustration [토픽 관련 응급 장면] white outline on dark background.
Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## 금지 항목 패턴 (❌ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left red rounded label: '절대 하지 마세요 ❌'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' red.
Rows stacked: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION ICON left (red ❌ overlay) + COMPACT white text right.
Red outlined box around all rows, comfortable padding.
No pixel values.

## 행동 항목 패턴 (✓ 슬라이드)
Dark navy background.
Top-left mint rounded label: '[행동] ✓'.
Headline COMPACT: '[내용]' white, '[핵심]' mint #2EC4B6.
Rows stacked: SMALL ICON left (mint ✓ overlay) + COMPACT white text right, GENEROUS spacing.
Mint outlined box around all rows.
No pixel values.

## 119 패턴
Full-width bright red header bar + white bold '[긴급 행동]'.
LARGE relevant illustration center (구급차/응급 아이콘).
Numbered items: red number + white text, GENEROUS spacing.
Large red rounded border around items.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' white small, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' white, '저장하세요' mint underline.
Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding.
출처 (white small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
Thin white divider.
소아과언니 white bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 white.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] mint.
No pixel values. No quotes.
